title: Spring Rolls with Crunchy Fermented Filling
description: A unique fusion of crunchy fermented filling and crispy spring rolls, perfect for a light snack or appetizer. The combination of textures and flavors will keep you coming back for more.
instructions: Prepare the filling by mixing the fermented vegetables, spring onions, and crunchy peanuts.
Soak the rice paper sheets in water for 30 seconds.
Place a sheet on a flat surface and arrange about 1/4 cup of the filling in the center.
Fold the bottom half of the sheet over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll up the sheet to form a tight cylinder.
Heat the sesame oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the spring rolls and cook until crispy and golden brown, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Drain the spring rolls on paper towels and serve hot with a drizzle of syrup and a sprinkle of salt.
